filters.q: has:attachment (filename:pdf OR filename:jpg OR filename:jpeg OR filename:png)

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 Duplicate Invoice Alert — ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown Vendor') + ' · Invoice #' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.invoice_number || 'N/A') }}
parameters.html:
={{ 'A duplicate invoice was detected and blocked from entry.

Vendor: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown') + '
Invoice #: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + '
Total: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.total || '0.00') + '
Action: Moving file to `/Invoices/Duplicates/` and aborting Append.' }}

parameters.q: name = 'Duplicates' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and trashed = false

parameters.subject: ={{ '✅ Invoice processed — ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown') + ' · ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.currency || '$') + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.total || '0.00') }}
parameters.html:
={{ 'Invoice #' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown') + ' has been automatically extracted and approved.

Total: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.currency || '$') + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.total || '0.00') + '
Due Date: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.due_date || 'N/A') + '

View in Google Sheets' }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '⚠️ Invoice needs review — ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown') + ' · ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.currency || '$') + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.total || '0.00') }}
parameters.html:
={{ 'Invoice #' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.invoice_number || 'N/A') + ' from ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.extracted_data?.vendor_name || 'Unknown') + ' requires your attention.

Status: ' + $('determineStatus').item.json.status + '

Issues Found:
- Math Discrepancies: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.mathDiscrepancies && $('determineStatus').item.json.mathDiscrepancies.length > 0 ? $('determineStatus').item.json.mathDiscrepancies.join(', ') : 'None') + '
- Low Confidence Fields: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.lowConfidenceFields && $('determineStatus').item.json.lowConfidenceFields.length > 0 ? $('determineStatus').item.json.lowConfidenceFields.map(f => f.field + ' (' + f.confidence + '%)').join(', ') : 'None') + '
- Flags: ' + ($('determineStatus').item.json.flags && $('determineStatus').item.json.flags.length > 0 ? $('determineStatus').item.json.flags.join(', ') : 'None') + '

Review in Google Sheets' }}

parameters.q: ={{ "name = '" + new Date().toISOString().substring(0, 7) + "' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.folder' and 'YOUR_PROCESSED_PARENT_FOLDER_ID_HERE' in parents and trashed = false" }}

value.Tokens Used: ={{ $('Claude API Call').item.json.usage?.output_tokens ? ($('Claude API Call').item.json.usage.input_tokens + $('Claude API Call').item.json.usage.output_tokens) : 0 }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔥 CRITICAL PIPELINE ERROR — ' + ($('detectFileType').item.json.pdf_filename || 'Unknown File') }}
parameters.html:
={{ 'An invoice has failed extraction after all automatic retry attempts.

File: ' + ($('detectFileType').item.json.pdf_filename || 'Unknown') + '
Stage: Claude API Extraction / Parsing
Error Message: ' + ($('Parse Claude Response').item.json.extracted_data?.raw_response || 'API Connection Failed') }}
